_meta.description: Internal quality report for registry-backed Module Builder assets.

recommended_next_actions: Close remaining unpublishable record surfaces before rollout.
Bridge persisted workflows into the workflow engine before exposing transition UX.
Resolve remaining record endpoint/runtime contract gaps before publishing modules.
